items.html: *The fourth discernment is the one called a minor. For at first she was a discernment of a rib [Tzela], a complete measure behind the Chazeh [chest], with no Partzuf of ten Sefirot in her yet. Then the verse said, "It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a help meet for him." Then He took this rib and built it into a complete Partzuf at his back, as will be written, God willing.
